message:
🐛 Move DB to Application Support to avoid file permission prompt (#87)

- Change getApplicationDocumentsDirectory → getApplicationSupportDirectory
- Auto-migrate existing DB from ~/Documents/clubtivi/ on first launch
- Update backup_service.dart export/import paths
- Eliminates repeated macOS file access permission dialog on startup

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
